nasb.text: “The Mighty One, God, the Lord, the Mighty One, God, the Lord! He knows, and may Israel itself know. If it was in rebellion, or if in an unfaithful act against the Lord do not save us this day!

esv.text: “The Mighty One, God, the Lord! The Mighty One, God, the Lord! He knows; and let Israel itself know! If it was in rebellion or in breach of faith against the Lord, do not spare us today

cnv.text: “大能者　神耶和華！大能者　神耶和華，他是知道的，願以色列也知道；如果我們存心背叛，或是對耶和華不忠，今日就不要放過我們。

ccb.text: “大能的上帝耶和华，大能的上帝耶和华，祂知道一切！以色列人也当知道！如果我们做了违背或干犯耶和华的事，愿祂今天就不放过我们！
